name: "🚀 Good First Issue: Help LearnVault!"
about: "A starter issue for new contributors to help improve LearnVault."
title: "[Good First Issue] <describe your improvement or bug>"
labels: ["good first issue", "help wanted", "contribution"]
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

This issue is open for new contributors to help improve LearnVault! You can pick any of the following tasks or suggest your own improvement.

## Tasks You Can Help With
- Add new features or improve existing ones (see [README.md](../README.md) and [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- Write or improve documentation
- Add or improve tests
- Refactor code for clarity or performance
- Help with UI/UX improvements
- Review and update smart contract documentation
- Suggest new course tracks or content ideas

## Getting Started
- Read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- Make sure to follow the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- Comment below to claim this issue or suggest your own

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the contributing guidelines
- [ ] I have checked for existing issues
- [ ] I am opening this issue to help LearnVault grow!

---

*Thank you for your interest in contributing to LearnVault!*
